app.title: Reissulla
forms.errorSummary.heading: Please fix:
personaWizard.heading: Set up your accessibility profile
personaWizard.intro: Three quick yes/no questions. We'll tailor routing and layout to your needs. You can change everything later in Settings.
personaWizard.questions.wheelchair: Do you use a wheelchair or need step-free routes?
personaWizard.questions.screenReader: Do you use a screen reader?
personaWizard.questions.stroller: Do you travel with a stroller or pram?
personaWizard.saveError: Couldn't save. The choices are stored on this device for now.
auth.error.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
auth.error.sendLink: Couldn't send the sign-in email. Please try again.
auth.checkEmail.title: Check your email
auth.checkEmail.body: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device — the link expires in 15 minutes.
login.heading: Log in
login.magicLinkPrompt: Forgot your password, or prefer email-only?
register.heading: Create an account
register.name: Name
settings.heading: Settings
settings.notSignedIn: Sign in to save preferences across devices.
settings.profile.name: Display name
settings.language.label: Language
settings.theme.label: Theme
settings.highContrast.label: High contrast
settings.fontScale.label: Text size
settings.reduceMotion.label: Reduce motion
settings.srOptimised.label: Screen-reader-optimised layout
settings.srOptimised.help: List-first variants and denser ARIA where supported.
settings.tempUnit.label: Temperature
settings.distanceUnit.label: Distance
settings.timeFormat.label: Time format
settings.persona.localOnly: Sign in to sync these across devices. For now they're stored on this device only.
locations.empty: You haven't saved any locations yet.
locations.shareError: Couldn't share. Try copying the URL from the address bar instead.
recentPlaces.empty: No recent places yet. Search or pick a destination on the map to start tracking visits here.
recentPlaces.clearConfirm: Clear every recent place from this account?
settings.account.exportHelp: GDPR-style JSON export of every saved location, preference, and recent place.
settings.account.deleteConfirm: This permanently deletes your account and everything in it. Continue?
dashboard.heading: Dashboard
dashboard.placeholder: Your weather and transit overview at a glance.
dashboard.signedOutIntro: Save locations and we'll show your daily weather and transit here. For now, here's what's around you.
dashboard.gpsUnavailable: Location unavailable. Allow location access or set a primary saved place to see weather and stops here.
dashboard.noSaved: You haven't saved any locations yet. Save somewhere to see it here.
dashboard.savePromptName: Pick a name (e.g. Home, Work, Cottage)
